title: TRACE
description: Find the hidden six-square path in five pings.

title: Roll & Reach
description: Roll a block to the glowing goal tile in as few moves as possible.

title: The Loop
description: Balance energy, industry, research, society, and ecology for as long as the loop can hold.

title: FLUX
description: Paint with fundamental elements that obey simple rules. Watch sand fall, fire spread, plants grow, and reactions emerge.
